---
title: "Session 3: Reproducibility, Continued"
subtitle: "Replication packages in practice (with Lars Vilhuber)"
date: 2026-04-15
---

## Where this session fits

The second reproducibility session continues with [Lars Vilhuber](https://www.ilr.cornell.edu/people/lars-vilhuber). We move from principles to practice: building a replication package, handling data that cannot be posted, documenting computational environments.

## Materials

The session works through a hands-on example of building a deposit-ready replication package. Start at the linked anchor below; it drops you directly at the example-of-deposit slide in Lars's day-1 tutorial.

- **Primary**: [Day-1 tutorial: example of deposit](https://larsvilhuber.github.io/day1-tutorial/#/example-of-deposit)
- **Bonus**: [Self-checking reproducibility](https://larsvilhuber.github.io/self-checking-reproducibility/) for auditing your own replication package before submission.
